channel.title: trippie redd on Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in trippie redd on Tracker

item.title: arm and leg
item.description: First previewed 2019-02-05 by Trippie Redd on an Instagram Live. An unmastered and tagged version, with part of Playboi Carti’s verse skipped, leaked on 2019-09-28. The entire unedited song was first previewed in an Instagram post by @twoninehundred on 2021-04-24, eventually leaking on 2022-09-11.
